name: excel-mcp-server-authoring-workflow
questions: What workbook or spreadsheet task are you trying to automate?
Will other agents consume these capabilities directly, or do end users need guided prompts and agents?
Do you need persistent workflow state across multiple Excel operations?

recommendation.reason: Excel MCP Server is best introduced as reusable spreadsheet skills before adding customer-facing orchestration.

introduceWhen: routing between multiple agents belongs inside the plugin
workflows need durable coordination beyond single Excel operations
